title: Oreogrammitis glabrata

The species Oreogrammitis glabrata is native to New Caledonia and is known for its unique characteristics. Further classification of Oreogrammitis glabrata includes its rank as a species within the kingdom Plantae, phylum Pteridophyta, and class Polypodiopsida. intro: Oreogrammitis glabrata, also known as the African hair fern, is a species of epiphytic fern native to tropical Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as hypertension and atherosclerosis. The bioactive constituents of O. glabrata include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal effects.
